core.name: open_items
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      BSID.BUKRS,
      BSID.KUNNR,
      BSID.BELNR,
      BSID.BUDAT,
      BSID.FAEDT,
      BSID.WAERS,
      BSID.DMBTR,
      BSID.WRBTR,
      DAYS_BETWEEN(BSID.FAEDT, CURRENT_DATE) AS DAYS_OVERDUE
    FROM "SLT_PRD_FI"."BSID" AS BSID
    WHERE BSID.BUKRS IS NOT NULL
  )

core.name: enriched
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      oi.BUKRS,
      oi.KUNNR,
      oi.BELNR,
      oi.BUDAT,
      oi.FAEDT,
      oi.WAERS,
      oi.DMBTR,
      oi.WRBTR,
      oi.DAYS_OVERDUE,
      KNA1.NAME1 AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
      CASE
        WHEN oi.DAYS_OVERDUE <= 0  THEN 'Current'
        WHEN oi.DAYS_OVERDUE <= 30 THEN '1-30 Days'
        WHEN oi.DAYS_OVERDUE <= 60 THEN '31-60 Days'
        WHEN oi.DAYS_OVERDUE <= 90 THEN '61-90 Days'
        ELSE 'Over 90 Days'
      END AS AGING_BUCKET
    FROM open_items AS oi
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_FI"."KNA1" AS KNA1
      ON oi.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
  )

core.name: stock_base
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      MARD.WERKS,
      MARD.LGORT,
      MARD.MATNR,
      MARD.LABST,
      MARD.EINME
    FROM "SLT_PRD_MM"."MARD" AS MARD
    WHERE MARD.LABST > 0 OR MARD.EINME > 0
  )

core.name: material_info
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      sb.WERKS,
      sb.LGORT,
      sb.MATNR,
      sb.LABST,
      sb.EINME,
      MARA.MEINS,
      MARA.MTYPE,
      MAKT.MAKTX,
      T001W.NAME1 AS PLANT_NAME,
      MBEW.STPRS * sb.LABST AS STOCK_VALUE,
      CASE
        WHEN sb.LABST = 0 THEN 'Out of Stock'
        WHEN sb.LABST < 10 THEN 'Low Stock'
        ELSE 'In Stock'
      END AS STOCK_STATUS
    FROM stock_base AS sb
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_MM"."MARA" AS MARA ON sb.MATNR = MARA.MATNR
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_MM"."MAKT" AS MAKT ON sb.MATNR = MAKT.MATNR
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_MM"."T001W" AS T001W ON sb.WERKS = T001W.WERKS
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_MM"."MBEW" AS MBEW ON sb.MATNR = MBEW.MATNR AND sb.WERKS = MBEW.BWKEY
  )

core.name: order_header
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      VBAK.VBELN,
      VBAK.ERDAT,
      VBAK.AUART,
      VBAK.KUNNR,
      VBAK.WAERK,
      VBAK.VKORG,
      VBAK.GBSTK
    FROM "SLT_PRD_SD"."VBAK" AS VBAK
    WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= ADD_YEARS(CURRENT_DATE, -2)
  )

core.name: order_items
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      oh.VBELN,
      oh.ERDAT,
      oh.AUART,
      oh.KUNNR,
      oh.WAERK,
      oh.VKORG,
      oh.GBSTK,
      VBAP.MATNR,
      VBAP.ARKTX,
      VBAP.KWMENG,
      VBAP.NETWR,
      VBAP.MWSBP
    FROM order_header AS oh
    INNER JOIN "SLT_PRD_SD"."VBAP" AS VBAP ON oh.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
  )

core.name: enriched
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT
      oi.VBELN,
      oi.ERDAT,
      oi.AUART,
      oi.KUNNR,
      KNA1.NAME1 AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
      oi.MATNR,
      oi.ARKTX,
      oi.WAERK,
      oi.VKORG,
      oi.KWMENG,
      oi.NETWR,
      oi.MWSBP,
      CASE oi.GBSTK
        WHEN 'A' THEN 'Open'
        WHEN 'B' THEN 'Partially Processed'
        WHEN 'C' THEN 'Completed'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
      END AS ORDER_STATUS
    FROM order_items AS oi
    LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_SD"."KNA1" AS KNA1 ON oi.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
  )

core.name: BS
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT 
    BELNR,                     
    BUKRS,                    
    GJAHR,                
    MAX(CASE WHEN BUZEI  LIKE '%1' THEN ZUONR END) AS ZUONR,  
    MAX(CASE WHEN BUZEI NOT LIKE '%1' THEN LIFNR END) AS LIFNR  ,
    MAX(CASE WHEN BUZEI NOT LIKE '%1' THEN KUNNR END) AS KUNNR,
    MAX(CASE WHEN BUZEI NOT LIKE '%1' THEN SGTXT END) AS SGTXT
FROM "SLT_PRD_BAP"."BSEG"
WHERE  GJAHR >= ADD_YEARS(TO_DATE(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) || '-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), -5)
 --GJAHR = 2022                      
GROUP BY BELNR, BUKRS, GJAHR    )

core.name: cte2
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT DISTINCT
RBUKRS, RBUSA, RYEAR,  DOCNR, RACCT, POPER, f.BUDAT, BS.LIFNR, BS.KUNNR,
RTCUR, RWCUR, WSL, TSL, HSL, BS.ZUONR, febcl.selvon as payment_order,
 BS.SGTXT, EXTRACT_DAY(f.BUDAT) AS "DAY",  
WEEKDAY(f.BUDAT) AS "WEEKDAY", DAYNAME (f.BUDAT) AS "DAYNAME", 
CEIL(DAYOFMONTH(f.BUDAT) / 6.0) AS SixDayGroup,     
CEIL((DAYOFMONTH(f.BUDAT) + WEEKDAY(TO_DATE(YEAR(f.BUDAT) || '-' || MONTH(f.BUDAT) || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 7.0) AS WeekOfMonth,
DC.FULLNAME AS Customer_Name, DV.FULLNAME AS Vendor_Name
FROM "SLT_PRD_BAP"."FAGLFLEXA" AS F
INNER JOIN BS
ON F.RYEAR = BS.GJAHR AND F.DOCNR = BS.BELNR AND F.RBUKRS = BS.BUKRS 
INNER JOIN "SLT_PRD_BAP"."T012K" AS T
 ON  T.hkont = F.RACCT
 INNER JOIN "SLT_PRD_BAP"."BSEG" AS BSEG
ON F.RYEAR = BSEG.GJAHR AND F.DOCNR = BSEG.BELNR AND F.RBUKRS = BSEG.BUKRS AND BSEG.BUZEI LIKE '%1' and  BSEG.GJAHR >= ADD_YEARS(TO_DATE(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) || '-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), -5)
LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_BAP"."BKPF" AS BKPF ON BKPF.BELNR = BSEG.BELNR AND BKPF.BUKRS = BSEG.BUKRS AND BKPF.GJAHR = BSEG.GJAHR AND BKPF.GJAHR >= ADD_YEARS(TO_DATE(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) || '-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), -5)
LEFT JOIN "SLT_PRD_BAP"."FEBCL" AS FEBCL ON left("BKPF"."BKTXT", 8) = febcl.kukey and RIGHT(BKPF."BKTXT", 5) = FEBCL.ESNUM
LEFT JOIN "_SYS_BIC"."sc-dm-dev.Time_Intelligence/DIM_VEND" AS DV ON BS.LIFNR = DV.LIFNR
LEFT JOIN "_SYS_BIC"."sc-dm-dev.Time_Intelligence/DIM_CUST" AS DC ON BS.KUNNR = DC.KUNNR
WHERE RYEAR >= ADD_YEARS(TO_DATE(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) || '-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), -5) )

core.name: cte3
custom.sap.hana.calscript.v7.transformat:
SELECT 
      RBUKRS, RBUSA, RYEAR,  DOCNR, RACCT, POPER, BUDAT, LIFNR, KUNNR,
      RTCUR, RWCUR, WSL, TSL, HSL, ZUONR, payment_order, SGTXT, "DAY", 
      "WEEKDAY", "DAYNAME", SixDayGroup, WeekOfMonth, Customer_Name, Vendor_Name,
      CASE
	    WHEN nullif(trim(payment_order), '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(trim(LIFNR), '') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(trim(KUNNR), '') IS NULL 
	    AND HSL > 0 AND TSL > 0 AND WSL > 0 THEN 'refund'
	    WHEN nullif(trim(payment_order), '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(trim(LIFNR), '') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(trim(KUNNR), '') IS NULL THEN 'payment'
	    WHEN nullif(trim(payment_order), '') IS NULL AND nullif(trim(LIFNR), '') IS NULL AND NULLIF(trim(KUNNR), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 'receipt'
	    WHEN nullif(trim(payment_order), '') IS NULL AND nullif(trim(LIFNR), '') IS NULL AND NULLIF(trim(KUNNR), '') IS NULL THEN 'other'
	    ELSE 'unknown'
	  END AS transaction_type
FROM cte2)
